title: MedDRA Terminology
description: Medical Dictionary for Regulatory Activities — standardized medical terminology for PV coding

tools.name: search-terms
tools.description: Search MedDRA terms across all hierarchy levels (SOC, HLGT, HLT, PT, LLT)

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Hierarchy level: SOC, HLGT, HLT, PT, LLT

tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will search MedDRA browser for matching terms across hierarchy levels."}

tools.name: get-term-hierarchy
tools.description: Get the full MedDRA hierarchy path for a preferred term
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will return LLT→PT→HLT→HLGT→SOC hierarchy for the given term."}

tools.name: get-soc-terms
tools.description: List all Preferred Terms under a System Organ Class

tools.name: get-smq
tools.description: Get Standardised MedDRA Query terms for a safety topic
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will return SMQ member terms with narrow/broad scope classification."}
